chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. S – 1017 & 1018 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on CMA No.7576/24 2.For order on CMA No.7577/24 3.For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 None present for petitioner ---------- Name of petitioner is called out in the Court. None appeared for petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the case on last date of hearing. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
